nasb.text: All of these were enrolled in the genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

esv.text: All of these were recorded in genealogies in the days of Jotham king of Judah, and in the days of Jeroboam king of Israel.

cnv.text: 以上所有這些人，在猶大王約坦和以色列王耶羅波安在位的日子，都記載在家譜上。

ccb.text: 这些人是在犹大王约坦和以色列王耶罗波安执政期间被记录在族谱里的。
